question: What is NexusAI?
answer: NexusAI is an all-in-one AI-powered SaaS platform that helps teams automate workflows, analyze data, and collaborate in real time. It combines machine learning models, smart dashboards, and integrations with popular tools like Slack, Notion, and GitHub.

question: How do I create an account?
answer: You can sign up for NexusAI at nexusai.io/signup. Enter your work email, choose a password, and verify your email address. You'll be guided through an onboarding flow to set up your workspace.

question: Is NexusAI free to use?
answer: NexusAI offers a free tier with up to 3 projects, 1 GB storage, and 500 AI queries per month. For larger teams, the Pro plan starts at $29/month and the Enterprise plan offers custom pricing.

question: What are the pricing plans?
answer: We offer three plans: Free (individual use), Pro at $29/user/month (unlimited projects, 50 GB storage, 10,000 AI queries), and Enterprise (custom pricing, SSO, dedicated support, SLA guarantees).

question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
answer: Yes, you can cancel your NexusAI subscription at any time from your account settings under Billing → Cancel Plan. Your account remains active until the end of the billing cycle.

question: Does NexusAI offer a free trial?
answer: Yes! NexusAI offers a 14-day free trial of the Pro plan. No credit card is required to start. Simply sign up and select 'Start Free Trial' during onboarding.

question: What integrations does NexusAI support?
answer: NexusAI integrates with Slack, Microsoft Teams, Notion, Jira, GitHub, GitLab, Google Drive, Dropbox, Salesforce, HubSpot, and over 50 other tools via Zapier or our REST API.

question: How do I connect NexusAI to Slack?
answer: Go to Settings → Integrations → Slack, click 'Connect', and authorize the NexusAI Slack app. You can then receive alerts, summaries, and AI insights directly in your Slack channels.

question: Is there a mobile app?
answer: Yes, NexusAI has mobile apps for iOS and Android. Download them from the App Store or Google Play. The mobile app supports all core features including dashboards, notifications, and AI chat.

question: What AI models does NexusAI use?
answer: NexusAI uses a combination of proprietary fine-tuned language models, GPT-4-class models for chat and summarization, and custom ML models trained on domain-specific data. All models run on secure, isolated cloud infrastructure.

question: How secure is my data on NexusAI?
answer: NexusAI is SOC 2 Type II certified and GDPR compliant. All data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). We never sell your data to third parties.

question: Where is my data stored?
answer: Data is stored on AWS infrastructure in the US-East and EU-West regions. Enterprise customers can choose their preferred region for data residency compliance.

question: Does NexusAI support GDPR compliance?
answer: Yes, NexusAI is fully GDPR compliant. You can export, delete, or restrict processing of your personal data from Settings → Privacy. We also offer a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) for Enterprise customers.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: On the login page, click 'Forgot Password'. Enter your email and we'll send a reset link valid for 30 minutes. If you don't receive it, check your spam folder or contact support@nexusai.io.

question: Can I invite team members?
answer: Yes, go to Settings → Team → Invite Members. Enter email addresses (comma-separated) and assign roles (Admin, Editor, Viewer). Free plan supports up to 3 members; Pro and Enterprise have no limit.

question: What roles are available in NexusAI?
answer: NexusAI supports three roles: Admin (full access, billing, user management), Editor (create/edit projects, use AI features), and Viewer (read-only access to shared dashboards and reports).

question: How do I create a project?
answer: From your dashboard, click '+ New Project', enter a name and optional description, choose a template or start blank, and assign team members. Projects are the primary workspace unit in NexusAI.

question: What templates are available?
answer: NexusAI offers 30+ templates including Data Analysis, Customer Insights, Marketing Dashboard, Bug Tracker, Sprint Planner, Sales Pipeline, Content Calendar, and Research Hub.

question: How does the AI assistant work?
answer: The AI assistant uses your project context to answer questions, generate summaries, draft documents, analyze data, and suggest next steps. It learns from your team's interactions to improve recommendations over time.

question: Can NexusAI analyze CSV files?
answer: Yes! Upload any CSV file to a project and the AI will automatically profile the data, detect column types, identify missing values, generate statistics, and suggest visualizations. You can also run natural language queries on your data.

question: How do I export data from NexusAI?
answer: Go to your project, click the '⋯' menu, and select Export. You can export as CSV, JSON, Excel, or PDF. Dashboard reports can be exported as PDF or PNG. API access is available on Pro and Enterprise plans.

question: Does NexusAI have an API?
answer: Yes, NexusAI provides a fully documented REST API and Python/JavaScript SDKs. API keys can be generated in Settings → API. Rate limits are 1,000 req/min on Pro and unlimited on Enterprise.

question: Where can I find the API documentation?
answer: Full API documentation is available at docs.nexusai.io/api. It includes guides, authentication, endpoint references, code examples in Python/JS/cURL, and a Postman collection.

question: How do I contact customer support?
answer: You can reach support via live chat (bottom-right on any page), email at support@nexusai.io, or by submitting a ticket at nexusai.io/support. Pro users get 24/7 email support; Enterprise users get a dedicated success manager.

question: What is the uptime SLA?
answer: NexusAI guarantees 99.9% uptime for Pro plans and 99.99% for Enterprise. You can check real-time status and historical uptime at status.nexusai.io.

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: To permanently delete your account, go to Settings → Account → Delete Account. Note: this action is irreversible and will delete all your data within 30 days. We recommend exporting your data first.

question: Can I use NexusAI offline?
answer: Core viewing features (saved reports, dashboards) are available offline via the mobile app. AI features, live collaboration, and data sync require an internet connection.

question: What browsers are supported?
answer: NexusAI supports the latest versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. We recommend Chrome for the best experience. Internet Explorer is not supported.

question: How does billing work?
answer: Billing is monthly or annual (annual saves 20%). Charges are processed on your subscription start date. You can view invoices, update payment methods, and manage billing in Settings → Billing.

question: Can I switch between plans?
answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately. Downgrades take effect at the start of the next billing cycle. Prorated credits are applied for upgrades.

question: Does NexusAI support Single Sign-On (SSO)?
answer: SSO is available on the Enterprise plan. We support SAML 2.0 and OAuth 2.0 with identity providers including Okta, Azure AD, Google Workspace, and OneLogin.

question: How do I set up two-factor authentication?
answer: Go to Settings → Security → Two-Factor Authentication. We support authenticator apps (Google Authenticator, Authy), SMS, and hardware security keys (FIDO2/WebAuthn).

question: What is the maximum file upload size?
answer: Free plan: 10 MB per file, 1 GB total. Pro plan: 500 MB per file, 50 GB total. Enterprise: custom limits up to 5 TB. Supported formats: CSV, XLSX, JSON, PDF, PNG, JPG, MP4, and more.

question: How do I share a dashboard?
answer: Open any dashboard, click 'Share' in the top right, and choose: Invite specific members, generate a public link (read-only), or embed via iframe. Permissions can be set per share link.

question: Can I embed NexusAI dashboards?
answer: Yes, Pro and Enterprise users can embed dashboards as iframes. Go to Dashboard → Share → Embed, configure permissions, and copy the embed code. Embedded dashboards auto-update in real time.

question: What is NexusAI Autopilot?
answer: NexusAI Autopilot is an automation feature that runs scheduled AI workflows—like weekly report generation, anomaly alerts, or competitor analysis—without manual triggers. Available on Pro and Enterprise.

question: How do I enable notifications?
answer: Go to Settings → Notifications to configure email, Slack, or in-app alerts for events like task completions, AI insights, threshold breaches, and team mentions.

question: Does NexusAI support multiple languages?
answer: The NexusAI interface is available in English, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Japanese, and Simplified Chinese. The AI assistant can understand and respond in 40+ languages.

question: How is NexusAI different from competitors?
answer: Unlike generic BI tools, NexusAI is built AI-first — every feature is designed around intelligent automation and natural language interaction. We combine the power of a data platform, project manager, and AI assistant in a single unified workspace.

question: Where can I learn how to use NexusAI?
answer: Visit our Help Center at help.nexusai.io, watch video tutorials on our YouTube channel, or join the NexusAI Community Forum. We also offer live onboarding webinars every Tuesday.
